description_long: This is a black GMC pickup truck with a double cab and four doors, featuring a spacious cargo bed at the rear. The body is primarily composed of glossy black metal panels, with chrome accents on the wheels, side steps, and front grille. The front end displays a prominent GMC badge, flanked by rectangular headlights and a robust bumper. The rear view reveals a large tailgate, red taillights, and a rear window integrated into the cab. The truck sits on large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with visible lug nuts and black tires. The windows are tinted, and the side mirrors are mounted on the doors, providing a modern and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A glossy black GMC pickup truck with four doors, chrome accents, and a spacious rear cargo bed. It features alloy wheels, tinted windows, and a robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the double cab, four doors, chrome side step, and full length of the cargo bed.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tailgate, rear window, taillights, and the width of the cargo bed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the double cab, four doors, and cargo bed from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the GMC badge, grille, headlights, and front bumper.
